understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to complete all levels of the KA59 puzzle by maneuvering selectable pieces to push objects onto goal tiles marked as '+', satisfying the win condition for each level until the entire game is won.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions shift the selected piece by one cell (3 pixels) in the chosen direction, potentially pushing adjacent pushable objects; walls block movement and must be navigated around. Switching between selectable pieces is achieved using the CLICK action on their exact pixel coordinates, with the grid using [x, y] positions where x increases rightward and y increases downward.
